title: Winter Sentinel freeze attacking creature for 1 turn cycle

card.rawText: When your opponent finishes their attack, play this card. Negate the attack and freeze the attacking creature for 1 turn cycle. Frozen creature cannot inflict Atk damage or be sacrificed.

effect.value: Frozen; cannot inflict Atk damage or be sacrificed
